# Voqal AI — AI Receptionist UK

> Voqal AI Ltd is a UK-registered company (Companies House No. 17080303) providing 24/7 AI voice receptionist services for UK and US businesses. AI agents answer inbound calls, book appointments, and qualify leads. Plans from £197/month, no long-term contracts.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://voqalai.com/): Overview of 24/7 AI phone answering, booking, and lead qualification
- [Pricing](https://voqalai.com/pricing/): Starter £197, Pro £397, Premium £697 — monthly, no contracts
- [About](https://voqalai.com/about/): Founder, team, and company background
- [Book a Demo](https://voqalai.com/book/): Schedule a personalised demo (delivered within 24 hours)
- [Contact](https://voqalai.com/contact/): Phone, email, and enquiry form

- [AI Receptionist for Dental Practices](https://voqalai.com/ai-receptionist-dental-practices/)

- [AI Receptionist for Estate Agents](https://voqalai.com/ai-receptionist-estate-agents/)

## Key Facts
- Company: Voqal AI Ltd (Companies House No. 17080303)
- Founded: 2025
- Service area: United Kingdom and United States
- Service: 24/7 AI voice receptionist, AI chat agents, lead reactivation, process automation, AI-enhanced websites
- Pricing: From £197/month (Starter), no long-term contracts
- Onboarding: Personalised demo within 24 hours; live deployment after sign-off
- Compliance: UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018; data encrypted in transit and at rest

- Website: https://voqalai.com
- UK phone: +44 20 3996 0962
- US phone: +1 (332) 264-1587
- Email: info@voqalai.com
